title: lastrea vulcanica
intro: Lastrea vulcanica, also known as the Vulcan's fern or Japanese golden-rod fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia and is characterized by its golden-yellow or orange spores. The Lastrea vulcanica plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea vulcanica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Lastrea vulcanica include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or by applying a paste of the plant's leaves directly to the affected area.
